evals.name: redesign-saas-landing
evals.prompt: Please redesign this project to production quality. The codebase is in tests/fixture/. Scan it first, then diagnose every design problem you find, then fix the highest-priority issues. Work within the existing React + plain CSS stack — do not add Tailwind or change the build setup.
evals.expected_output: Upgraded App.jsx and App.css with: non-default font, OKLCH-based color palette, no pure #000/#fff, no purple/blue gradient, no 3-equal-column cards, hover states on buttons, corrected hero height, semantic HTML improvements, and copy rewrite removing AI clichés.

assertions.description: Output does not contain pure #000000 or #ffffff as primary colors
Purple/blue AI gradient (#667eea, #764ba2) removed from output
Inter is no longer the primary display font
Buttons have hover state defined
height: 100vh replaced with min-height or 100dvh
AI cliché copy removed (Elevate, Seamless, Unleash, Next-Gen, Game-changer, Leverage)
3-equal-column grid replaced with varied layout
Output is complete — no truncation, stubs or ellipsis

evals.name: create-dashboard-tool
evals.prompt: Build a SaaS landing page for 'Marble' — a lightweight team knowledge base tool. Target audience: small engineering teams (5–20 people) who are tired of outdated wikis. Tone: calm, focused, slightly opinionated. Use React + plain CSS only. Produce complete, runnable code.
evals.expected_output: A complete App.jsx + App.css with: non-default font, OKLCH-based colors, single accent color, intentional aesthetic direction, hover states on all interactive elements, no pure black/white, no purple gradient, no 3-equal-card layout, complete code with no stubs.

assertions.description: Does not use pure #000000 or #ffffff
Inter is not the primary display font
No cyan-on-dark or purple-to-blue gradient
Buttons or interactive elements have hover states
Colors defined using oklch() perceptual color space
No truncation, stubs, or ellipsis in output
Output includes both JSX component code and CSS

evals.name: refine-typography-color
evals.expected_output: Improved FeatureCard.jsx with: non-Inter font choice, OKLCH-based colors (no pure #000/#fff), inline styles moved to CSS classes or CSS variables, card simplified (remove one of: border/shadow/background as per redesign rules), semantic class names.

assertions.description: Inline style props removed from JSX in favor of CSS classes
Pure #000/#fff replaced with perceptually-adjusted colors
Inter font removed as primary choice
Colors use oklch() or CSS custom properties (design tokens)
Card no longer has all three of border + shadow + white background simultaneously
assertions.description_for_judge: Check whether the card has been simplified — it should not have all of: solid border, box-shadow, AND white background together. At least one should be removed or transformed.
